summary: Adjusted the opening to echo the blackout handoff from Chapter 12 while distinguishing it from Chapter 14's wake-up/table entry, fixed a morning text-preview continuity slip, and left the kitchen scissors in the closing image to support the next chapter's opening.
edits: Reframed the first sentence around Nita opening the co-op envelope so the chapter enters through action and carries forward the blackout return.
Changed Ben's text-preview excuse from school drop-off to transit trouble to remove the breakfast-scene timeline conflict.
Added the scissors to the final table image so the chapter exits more cleanly into Chapter 14's construction-paper opening.
